package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for time_loadlocation_per_call: `time.LoadLocation(...)` inside request or loop paths instead of reusing the location.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario681Negative(items []string) int {
	started := time.Now()
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		if !started.IsZero() { total += len(item) }
	}
	return total
}
